name: Wireless Bluetooth Headphones
description: Premium noise-cancelling wireless headphones with 30-hour battery life, deep bass, and comfortable over-ear design for immersive listening.

name: Minimalist Leather Watch
description: Elegant analog watch with genuine leather strap, sapphire crystal glass, and Japanese quartz movement. Water resistant to 50m.

name: Smart Fitness Tracker
description: Track your health 24/7 with heart rate monitoring, sleep analysis, step counting, and smartphone notifications. IP68 waterproof.

name: Classic Canvas Backpack
description: Vintage-style canvas backpack with padded laptop compartment, multiple pockets, and reinforced stitching. Perfect for travel or daily use.

name: Premium Coffee Maker
description: Programmable 12-cup drip coffee maker with built-in grinder, thermal carafe, and auto-shutoff. Brew restaurant-quality coffee at home.

name: Wireless Charging Pad
description: Fast wireless charger compatible with all Qi-enabled devices. Slim design with LED indicator and overcharge protection.

name: Sunglasses Aviator Classic
description: Timeless aviator sunglasses with UV400 protection, lightweight metal frame, and scratch-resistant polarized lenses.

name: Mechanical Keyboard RGB
description: Full-size mechanical gaming keyboard with hot-swappable switches, per-key RGB lighting, and aircraft-grade aluminum frame.

name: Yoga Mat Premium
description: Extra-thick 6mm yoga mat with non-slip surface, alignment lines, and carrying strap. Eco-friendly TPE material.

name: Portable Bluetooth Speaker
description: Waterproof portable speaker with 360-degree sound, 20-hour battery, and built-in microphone. Take your music anywhere.

name: Denim Jacket Classic
description: Classic denim jacket with a modern fit. Features button closure, chest pockets, and adjustable waist tabs. A wardrobe essential.

name: Stainless Steel Water Bottle
description: Double-wall vacuum insulated bottle keeps drinks cold 24h or hot 12h. BPA-free, leak-proof, and eco-friendly. 750ml capacity.
